name: ColorPicker
description: Hue + saturation/value picker with hex input.

api.name: ColorPicker
api.description: Hue + saturation/value picker with hex input.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, setting aria-required on the trigger button and (outside a FormField) appending a destructive-colored asterisk to the label.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid/error visual state (destructive border and focus ring) and aria-invalid, independent of the ambient FormField's validation state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the trigger (outside a FormField) when Invalid is set. Takes precedence over HelperText.

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the trigger (outside a FormField) when there is no error to display.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label text rendered above the trigger (outside a FormField, which supplies its own label).

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: HTML name attribute applied to the trigger button, used when the picker participates in native form submission.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The selected color, as a hex string (#RGB/#RRGGBB/#RRGGBBAA) or an rgba(r, g, b, a) string when the alpha slider has been used. Defaults to #000000 when null.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised whenever the color changes, via the SV canvas, hue/alpha sliders, RGB inputs, hex field, or a preset swatch.

parameters.name: ShowAlpha
parameters.description: Shows the alpha (opacity) slider and emits an rgba() Value whenever alpha drops below 100%.

parameters.name: Presets
parameters.description: Optional palette of hex colors rendered as clickable swatches below the RGB inputs.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the trigger button, preventing the popover from opening.

parameters.name: Open
parameters.description: Whether the picker popover is open. Two-way bindable via OpenChanged.

parameters.name: OpenChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the popover's open state changes, e.g. via the trigger, Escape, or an outside click.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the picker's outer wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the picker's outer wrapper.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised whenever the color changes, via the SV canvas, hue/alpha sliders, RGB inputs, hex field, or a preset swatch.

events.name: OpenChanged
events.description: Raised when the popover's open state changes, e.g. via the trigger, Escape, or an outside click.

records.name: ColorPickerContext
records.signature: ColorPickerContext(string Value, bool IsOpen, EventCallback<string> OnColorChanged, EventCallback<bool> SetOpen, string WrapperId)

mdSummary:
# ColorPicker

Hue + saturation/value picker with hex input.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/color-picker

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ColorPicker | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| ColorPicker | Required | `bool` | `false` | Marks the field as required, setting aria-required on the trigger button and (outside a FormField) appending a destructive-colored asterisk to the label. |
| ColorPicker | Invalid | `bool` | `false` | Forces the invalid/error visual state (destructive border and focus ring) and aria-invalid, independent of the ambient FormField's validation state. |
| ColorPicker | ErrorText | `string?` | `` | Error message shown below the trigger (outside a FormField) when Invalid is set. Takes precedence over HelperText. |
| ColorPicker | HelperText | `string?` | `` | Helper text shown below the trigger (outside a FormField) when there is no error to display. |
| ColorPicker | Label | `string?` | `` | Label text rendered above the trigger (outside a FormField, which supplies its own label). |
| ColorPicker | Name | `string?` | `` | HTML name attribute applied to the trigger button, used when the picker participates in native form submission. |
| ColorPicker | Value | `string?` | `` | The selected color, as a hex string (#RGB/#RRGGBB/#RRGGBBAA) or an rgba(r, g, b, a) string when the alpha slider has been used. Defaults to #000000 when null. |
| ColorPicker | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string>` | `` | Raised whenever the color changes, via the SV canvas, hue/alpha sliders, RGB inputs, hex field, or a preset swatch. |
| ColorPicker | ShowAlpha | `bool` | `false` | Shows the alpha (opacity) slider and emits an rgba() Value whenever alpha drops below 100%. |
| ColorPicker | Presets | `List<string>?` | `` | Optional palette of hex colors rendered as clickable swatches below the RGB inputs. |
| ColorPicker | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | Disables the trigger button, preventing the popover from opening. |
| ColorPicker | Open | `bool` | `false` | Whether the picker popover is open. Two-way bindable via OpenChanged. |
| ColorPicker | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` | Raised when the popover's open state changes, e.g. via the trigger, Escape, or an outside click. |
| ColorPicker | IsOpen | `bool` | `false` | Legacy alias for Open. |
| ColorPicker | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` | Legacy alias for OpenChanged. |
| ColorPicker | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the picker's outer wrapper. |
| ColorPicker | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the picker's outer wrapper. |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string>`) — Raised whenever the color changes, via the SV canvas, hue/alpha sliders, RGB inputs, hex field, or a preset swatch.
- `OpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`) — Raised when the popover's open state changes, e.g. via the trigger, Escape, or an outside click.
- `IsOpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`) — Legacy alias for OpenChanged.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
- `Escape` — HandleKeyDown handles Escape in ColorPicker.razor

## Example
```razor
<ColorPicker />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-popover`, `--color-popover-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/ColorPicker/ColorPicker.razor`
